film.title: Bhagwaan Dada
film.overview: A young man, Swaroop, moves to Bombay and is immediate mugged and left without shelter. He meets a man who helps him find a place to stay and a job, but Swaroop doesn't know that the man is a notorious gangster.

dialogues.dialogue: This is our uncle Haji Gaffar Ali Khan. And this is our aunt Rani Nirmala Devi.
